summary: PU-002 implemented runtime-card source precedence so duplicate source identities keep the highest-risk evidence record across normalized bundle inspection, local runtime-card assembly, and live-provider assembly. summary: PU-004 implemented audit-reference-report/v1 as a script-backed validator with focused fixture proof and a real May 22 audit run. The validator emits exactly one JSON object, accepts the existing --json compatibility flag, fails closed for missing, ignored, untracked, blocked, or usage-error cases, validates tracked extensionless artifacts under allowed prefixes, and ignores unresolved extensionless prose mentions to avoid false positives from future-module wording in audit reports.
